query: UPDATE island_guides SET featured = 1 WHERE (name = 'Dharavandhoo' AND atoll = 'Baa Atoll') OR (name = 'Fulhadhoo' AND atoll = 'Baa Atoll') OR (name = 'Ukulhas' AND atoll = 'Alif Alif Atoll') OR (name = 'Thoddoo' AND atoll = 'Alif Alif Atoll') OR (name = 'Mathiveri' AND atoll = 'Alif Alif Atoll') OR (name = 'Dhiddhoo' AND atoll = 'Alif Dhaal Atoll') OR (name = 'Omadhoo' AND atoll = 'Alif Dhaal Atoll') OR (name = 'Felidhoo' AND atoll = 'Vaavu Atoll') OR (name = 'Keyodhoo' AND atoll = 'Vaavu Atoll') OR (name = 'Meedhoo' AND atoll = 'Meemu Atoll') OR (name = 'Mulah' AND atoll = 'Meemu Atoll') OR (name = 'Magoodhoo' AND atoll = 'Faafu Atoll') OR (name = 'Nilandhoo' AND atoll = 'Faafu Atoll') OR (name = 'Kudahuvadhoo' AND atoll = 'Dhaalu Atoll') OR (name = 'Veligandu' AND atoll = 'Dhaalu Atoll') OR (name = 'Veymandoo' AND atoll = 'Thaa Atoll') OR (name = 'Thimarafushi' AND atoll = 'Thaa Atoll') OR (name = 'Fonadhoo' AND atoll = 'Laamu Atoll') OR (name = 'Kadhdhoo' AND atoll = 'Laamu Atoll') OR (name = 'Vilingili' AND atoll = 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll') OR (name = 'Gadhdhoo' AND atoll = 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll') OR (name = 'Thinadhoo' AND atoll = 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll') OR (name = 'Gemendhoo' AND atoll = 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll') OR (name = 'Fuvahmulah' AND atoll = 'Gnaviyani Atoll') OR (name = 'Gan' AND atoll = 'Addu Atoll') OR (name = 'Maradhoo' AND atoll = 'Addu Atoll') OR (name = 'Hanimadhoo' AND atoll = 'Haa Alifu Atoll') OR (name = 'Kelaa' AND atoll = 'Haa Alifu Atoll') OR (name = 'Kulhudhuffushi' AND atoll = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll') OR (name = 'Nolhivarandhoo' AND atoll = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll') OR (name = 'Funadhoo' AND atoll = 'Shaviyani Atoll') OR (name = 'Lhaimagu' AND atoll = 'Shaviyani Atoll') OR (name = 'Landhoo' AND atoll = 'Noonu Atoll') OR (name = 'Velidhoo' AND atoll = 'Noonu Atoll') OR (name = 'Ungoofaaru' AND atoll = 'Raa Atoll') OR (name = 'Alifushi' AND atoll = 'Raa Atoll') OR (name = 'Naifaru' AND atoll = 'Lhaviyani Atoll') OR (name = 'Kurendhoo' AND atoll = 'Lhaviyani Atoll') OR (name = 'Malé' AND atoll = 'Kaafu Atoll') OR (name = 'Hulhumalé' AND atoll = 'Kaafu Atoll');
